recent_projects.name: iflow-mcp_mcp_server_trino
recent_projects.summary: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables secure interaction with Trino. This server allows AI assistants to list tables, read data, and execute SQL queries through a controlled interface, making data exploration and analysis safer and more structured.
